description: An alumnus calls to update their home address and employer information to stay connected with the university.

nodes.task_description: Identify the alumnus in the alumni database.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully locates the alumnus record.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new address and employment details from the alumnus.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the new information.

nodes.task_description: Update the alumnus's record in the development CRM.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the record in the system.
